items.title: Optimize Title Tags and Meta Descriptions for Better CTR
items.description: Rewrite title tags for top-ranking pages to include compelling value propositions and emotional triggers. Focus on aged lead pages ranking 8-11 with titles like 'Get High-Converting Aged IUL Leads - Same Day Delivery' instead of generic titles. A/B test meta descriptions with specific benefits and urgency.
items.expectedImpact: Increase CTR from 0.15% to 0.25-0.35%, potentially doubling organic traffic

items.title: Create Comprehensive IUL Lead Buying Guide
items.description: Develop a pillar page targeting 'how to buy IUL leads' that consolidates all IUL-related content. Include comparison tables, pricing guides, vendor reviews, and conversion tips. Link all existing IUL pages to this comprehensive resource.
items.expectedImpact: Capture more long-tail IUL queries and increase average session duration by 30-40%

items.title: Emergency Engagement Audit and UX Optimization
items.description: Immediately audit pages with highest bounce rates, focusing on load speed, mobile responsiveness, and content relevance. Implement heat mapping tools to identify user behavior patterns and optimize above-the-fold content for better engagement.
items.expectedImpact: Reduce bounce rate by 15-20% and improve engagement rate to 25%+ within 30 days

items.title: Optimize Meta Titles and Descriptions for CTR
items.description: Rewrite meta titles and descriptions for top-ranking pages (positions 8-25) to include compelling value propositions and action-oriented language. Focus on pages ranking for 'aged iul leads', 'affordable life insurance leads', and 'aged life insurance leads'.
items.expectedImpact: Increase CTR from 0.16% to 0.25%+ within 60 days, driving 50%+ more organic traffic

items.title: Implement Internal Linking Strategy for Lead Lifecycle Content
items.description: Create topic clusters around lead management, sales processes, and CRM systems. Add contextual internal links between related pages like lead lifecycle management (ranking position 3.7) and CRM comparison pages to distribute link equity and improve user flow.
items.expectedImpact: Reduce bounce rate to 60% and increase pages per session by 25%

items.title: Develop Aged Lead Pricing Calculator Tool
items.description: Build an interactive calculator that helps users estimate ROI on aged leads based on close rates, lead age, and industry. Target the query 'aged lead pricing guide' where you already rank well (position 4.9).
items.expectedImpact: Increase engagement rate to 45% and generate 20-30 new backlinks from industry sites

items.title: Diversify Content Beyond Insurance Focus
items.description: Create comprehensive content for mortgage, solar, and home improvement lead topics to reduce over-dependence on insurance content. Target queries like 'mortgage lead follow-up' and 'solar lead conversion strategies'.
items.expectedImpact: Expand addressable search market by 40% and reduce content concentration risk

items.title: Implement Internal Linking Strategy
items.description: Add strategic internal links from high-traffic homepage to related blog posts and buying guides. Create topic clusters linking insurance lead content to reduce single-page exits.
items.expectedImpact: Increase pages per session by 30% and reduce bounce rate by 10-15%

items.title: Develop Lead Magnet for Email Capture
items.description: Create downloadable resources like 'Ultimate Insurance Lead Follow-up Checklist' or 'Aged Lead Conversion Calculator' to capture emails from high-intent visitors before they bounce.
items.expectedImpact: Convert 5-10% of visitors to email subscribers, creating retargeting opportunities

items.title: Optimize for Voice Search and AI Queries
items.description: Add FAQ sections targeting conversational queries like 'what are the best aged insurance leads' and 'how much do IUL leads cost'. Structure content to answer specific questions that AI tools and voice assistants can easily extract.
items.expectedImpact: Capture 15-20% more traffic from AI referrals and voice search queries

items.title: Expand Mobile-Specific Content Optimization
items.description: Given mobile traffic represents 13% of search impressions but only 12.5% of clicks, optimize mobile user experience with shorter paragraphs, bullet points, and mobile-friendly CTAs.
items.expectedImpact: Improve mobile CTR by 25% and capture additional mobile search traffic
